description: continuous-quality-monitor reports quality signals during build and coaches, never blocks.

cases.prompt:
Report quality signals for this commit:
- Lint: 0 new issues (baseline 3)
- Typecheck: 1 new error (baseline 0)
- Coverage: 82.3% (baseline 83.1%)
- Tests: 417 → 421 (+4)
- Complexity: 2 functions above 15 (unchanged)
cases.notes: Typecheck regression + coverage slip. Coach, don't block.

cases.prompt: All signals are green: 0 lint errors, 0 type errors, coverage 89%, tests passing. Report.
cases.notes: Happy path — short, positive signal report.
